Detailed Description

Object header related definitions and type declarations

Definition in file header.h.

Define Documentation

#define HEADER_JAVA_OBJECT_SHIFT   (1)

Shift value used to obtain the C object bit

Definition at line 77 of file header.h.

Referenced by header_is_object().

#define HEADER_MARK_SHIFT   (0)

Shift value used to obtain the mark bit

Definition at line 74 of file header.h.

Referenced by header_clear_mark(), and header_is_marked().

#define HEADER_PCP_MASK   (~(((uintptr_t) 1 << HEADER_RESERVED) - 1))

Mask used to extract the packed class pointer from the header

Definition at line 80 of file header.h.

#define HEADER_RESERVED   (2)

Reserved bits in the header a Java object or C allocation

At the moment 2 bits are reserved, bit 31 is set if the object is marked and bit 30 is set if this is a Java object. The mark bit is always set for C objects

Definition at line 69 of file header.h.

Referenced by gc_sweep(), header_create_c(), and header_create_object().

#define HEADER_SIZE_MASK   HEADER_PCP_MASK

Mask used to extract the size of an allocation from the header

Definition at line 83 of file header.h.

#define JELATINE_HEADER_H   (1)

header.h inclusion macro

Definition at line 28 of file header.h.

Typedef Documentation

typedef uintptr_t header_t

Represents the meta-data added to an object including the object description and the extra fields used by the gc

Definition at line 34 of file header.h.
